issues.description: AttachDon action requires a 'condition' field to specify that only rested DON!! cards can be given. The DSL does not restrict to rested cards.
Target scope should be 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' but the action should clarify it applies DON!! cards FROM rested cards, not just attachment.
Missing 'cost' field to indicate this is an Activate action requiring the Character to rest. Should include cost:{type:'Rest',target:{scope:'Self'}}.
